data.name: phone_number:invalid_country_code
data.value: The number has an invalid country calling code.

data.name: phone_number:invalid_number
data.value: "{PropertyValue}" is not a valid phone number.

data.name: phone_number:local_number
data.value: The entered phone number don't have all the information to be dialled from anywhere inside or outside the country. Please enter the phone number in a global format.

data.name: collection:minimum_elements
data.value: {PropertyName} must contain at least {MinElements} items. The {PropertyName} contains {TotalElements} elements.

data.name: collection:maximum_elements
data.value: {PropertyName} must contain fewer than {MaxElements} items. The {PropertyName} contains {TotalElements} elements.

data.name: collection:unique_elements
data.value: {PropertyName} must contain unique items. The {PropertyName} contains {TotalDuplicates} duplicates.

data.name: national_id:invalid_egyptian_national_id
data.value: The entered national id is invalid.

data.name: url:invalid
data.value: The URL is invalid.

data.name: url:invalid_origin_format
data.value: The origin "{PropertyValue}" is not a valid absolute URI.

data.name: url:invalid_origin_scheme
data.value: The origin must use the HTTP or HTTPS scheme. Found: {Scheme}.

data.name: url:invalid_origin_path
data.value: The origin must not contain a path, query, or fragment.

data.name: url:invalid_origin_trailing_slash
data.value: The origin must not end with a trailing slash.

data.name: geo:invalid_latitude
data.value: Invalid latitude value. It must be between -90 and 90.

data.name: geo:invalid_longitude
data.value: Invalid longitude value. It must be between -180 and 180.

data.name: strings:only_numbers
data.value: The field must contain only numbers.

data.name: strings:only_decimals
data.value: The field must be a valid decimal number.

data.name: strings:invalid_slug
data.value: The field must be a valid slug (lowercase letters, digits, and single hyphens).

data.name: strings:invalid_username
data.value: The field must be a valid username (3–30 letters, digits, '-', '_', or '.', not starting, ending, or repeating a special character).

data.name: strings:invalid_zip_code
data.value: The field must be a valid postal/ZIP code.

data.name: strings:invalid_hex_color
data.value: The field must be a valid hex color (for example "#1a2b3c" or "1a2b3c").

data.name: strings:invalid_base64
data.value: The field must be a valid Base64-encoded string.

data.name: strings:not_trimmed
data.value: The field must not start or end with whitespace.

data.name: strings:invalid_culture
data.value: The field must be a valid culture/locale name (for example "en", "en-US").

data.name: strings:contains_scripts
data.value: The field must not contain script elements.

data.name: phone_number:invalid_mobile_number
data.value: "{PropertyValue}" is not a valid mobile phone number.

data.name: net:invalid_ipv4
data.value: The field must be a valid IPv4 address.

data.name: net:invalid_ipv6
data.value: The field must be a valid IPv6 address.

data.name: net:invalid_ip
data.value: The field must be a valid IP address.

data.name: enum:invalid_name
data.value: "{PropertyValue}" is not a valid value for {PropertyName}.

data.name: datetime:must_be_in_past
data.value: {PropertyName} must be a date in the past.

data.name: datetime:must_be_in_future
data.value: {PropertyName} must be a date in the future.

data.name: datetime:must_not_be_in_past
data.value: {PropertyName} must not be a date in the past.

data.name: datetime:must_not_be_in_future
data.value: {PropertyName} must not be a date in the future.

data.name: datetime:minimum_age
data.value: {PropertyName} must be at least {MinimumAge} years ago.
